prompt: A lone samurai / ronin warrior rendered in traditional Japanese sumi-e ink wash painting style, full-body dynamic pose, face mostly hidden in shadow, wearing flowing robes and straw hat / topknot hairstyle, carrying katana swords, dramatic motion as if mid-step or mid-draw.
